pageProps.content:
["$r",null,null,{"children":[["$r","h3",null,{"id":"nixpkgs-binary-cache","children":"Nixpkgs binary cache"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"目前 TUNA/BFSU/USTC 等并未提供 nix-darwin 的 binary cache，请使用官方源或 SJTUG。"}],"
",["$r","h4",null,{"id":"持久配置","children":"持久配置"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"以优先选择镜像，备选源站为例，选择以下配置之一："}],"
",["$r","ul",null,{"children":["
",["$r","li",null,{"children":["
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["单独安装的 Nix：编辑配置文件添加或修改如下项（多用户安装修改 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/nix/nix.conf"}],"，单用户安装修改 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"~/.config/nix/nix.conf"}],"）："]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-0","codeLanguage":"conf"}],"
"]}],"
",["$r","li",null,{"children":["
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["NixOS 21.11 及之前的版本在 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"configuration.nix"}]," 中使用如下配置（",["$r","a",null,{"href":"https://cache.nixos.org","rel":"nofollow","children":"https://cache.nixos.org"}]," 会被自动添加）"]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-1","codeLanguage":"nix"}],"
"]}],"
",["$r","li",null,{"children":["
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["NixOS 22.05 及之后的版本在 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"configuration.nix"}]," 中使用如下配置（",["$r","a",null,{"href":"https://cache.nixos.org","rel":"nofollow","children":"https://cache.nixos.org"}]," 会被自动添加）："]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-2","codeLanguage":"nix"}],"
"]}],"
"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["如果因为无法访问 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"https://cache.nixos.org","rel":"nofollow","children":"https://cache.nixos.org"}]," 等原因，希望避免自动添加该默认地址，请在配置中使用",["$r","code",null,{"children":"lib.mkForce"}],"。"]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-3","codeLanguage":"nix"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"Nix 2.4 及之后的版本可以在 substituter 链接参数中指定优先级 (1~100)："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-4","codeLanguage":"nix"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"查询 substituter 默认优先级："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-5","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"一般情况下，镜像的默认优先级为 40，与 cache.nixos.org 保持一致。"}],"
",["$r","h4",null,{"id":"临时使用","children":"临时使用"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"在安装 NixOS 时临时使用："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-6","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"在 NixOS 切换配置时临时使用："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-7","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"临时关闭可以通过还原 substituters 实现："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-8","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"指定 substituter 优先级："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-9","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"nixpkgs-channel","children":"Nixpkgs channel"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"注：SJTUG 提供了 binary cache，未提供该镜像。"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["单独安装的 Nix 替换 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"nixpkgs-unstable"}]," 命令如下："]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-10","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"替换 NixOS channel 命令如下（以 root 执行）："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[{"title":"系统版本","items":[["25.05",{"version":"25.05"}],["24.11",{"version":"24.11"}],["unstable",{"version":"unstable"}]]}],"templateId":"template-11","codeLanguage":"bash"}]]}]

compiledTemplates.template-0: {code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("substituters = ");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("/store https://cache.nixos.org/");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
compiledTemplates.template-3: {code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("# load `lib` into namespace at the file head with `{ config, pkgs, lib, ... }:`");t.b("\n" + i);t.b("nix.settings.substituters = lib.mkForce [ \"");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("/store\" ];");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
compiledTemplates.template-6: {code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("nixos-install --option substituters \"");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("/store https://cache.nixos.org\"");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
compiledTemplates.template-7: {code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("nixos-rebuild --option substituters \"");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("/store https://cache.nixos.org\"");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
compiledTemplates.template-8: {code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("nixos-rebuild --option substituters \"https://cache.nixos.org\"");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
compiledTemplates.template-9: {code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("nixos-rebuild --option substituters \"");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("/store?priority=10 https://cache.nixos.org\"");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
compiledTemplates.template-10: {code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("nix-channel --add ");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("/nixpkgs-unstable nixpkgs");t.b("\n" + i);t.b("nix-channel --update");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
compiledTemplates.template-11: {code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("nix-channel --add ");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("/nixos-");t.b(t.v(t.f("version",c,p,0)));t.b(" nixos");t.b("\n" + i);t.b("nix-channel --update");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
